case_title: CHRISTIAN MICHAEL JOHN TREZVANT VS. FORTE PROTECTIVE SERVICES, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TREZVANT, CHRISTIAN MICHAEL JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT FORTE PROTECTIVE SERVICES, INC., A  CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
